extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior insurance history: 2024 CNA Financial, premium 414601.77, 1 claim, no cancellations; 2023 Zurich Insurance Group, premium 423914.72, 0 claims, no cancellations; 2022 American International Group, premium 447842.42, 1 claim, no cancellations.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas. Eight listed Texas premises include office and mercantile occupancies totaling 1056000 square feet, all sprinklered.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program: No. Written contracts with all subcontractors: Yes. Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors: Yes. 24-hour doorperson or security on premises: Yes. Building fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R: Yes. Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring: Yes. OSHA citations in past 3 years: No.

concerns: EV charging stations are installed on the premises.
Amenities include swimming pools, exercise rooms, or other amenities.
Two claims reported across the 2022-2024 prior insurance history.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Two claims reported over the listed three-year prior insurance history: 1 claim in 2024, 0 claims in 2023, and 1 claim in 2022. No cancellations reported in any listed year.
positives: 24 years in business and 18 years with current management.
Written contracts with all subcontractors and indemnification required from all contractors.
All eight listed premises are sprinklered, and the application indicates buildings are fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R.
Fire alarms are hard-wired with central station monitoring.
Short-term rentals of less than one year are not permitted.
No OSHA citations in the past 3 years.
No cancellations reported in the prior insurance history.
